home.subtitle: Eliminate waiting chaos. Give your customers a seamless queuing experience.

features.realtimeDesc: See your position update live without refreshing
features.smsDesc: Get notified when your turn is approaching
features.analyticsDesc: Understand peak hours and optimize staffing
features.multilingualDesc: Available in Uzbek, Russian, and English

landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to manage queues
landing.featuresDesc: A complete platform designed for modern businesses that care about customer experience.
landing.howItWorksDesc: Get started in minutes, not days. Simple setup for powerful results.

steps.step1Desc: Create branches, define services, and configure counters in your dashboard.
steps.step2Desc: Customers take a number via kiosk, web, or Telegram bot — no app needed.
steps.step3Desc: Staff call customers in order. Analytics help you optimize over time.

landing.advancedDesc: Enterprise-grade features that grow with your business.

advanced.securityDesc: Bank-grade encryption and role-based access control to keep your data safe.
advanced.schedulingDesc: AI-powered wait time predictions that learn from your queue patterns.
advanced.multiTenantDesc: Manage multiple locations and branches from a single dashboard.
advanced.mobileDesc: Customers can join queues and track status from any device.
advanced.apiDesc: RESTful API and WebSocket support for seamless integrations.
advanced.whiteLabelDesc: Customize branding, colors, and domain to match your business.

landing.testimonialsDesc: See what our customers have to say about QueuePro.

testimonials.t1Text: QueuePro transformed our patient flow. Wait times dropped 40% in the first month.
testimonials.t2Text: The real-time analytics helped us optimize staffing. Our customers love the Telegram notifications.
testimonials.t3Text: We handle 500+ visitors daily. QueuePro made chaos into order.

landing.pricingDesc: Start free and scale as you grow. No hidden fees.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to transform your queue experience?
landing.ctaDesc: Join hundreds of businesses that trust QueuePro for smooth, stress-free customer flow.

footer.tagline: Smart queue management for modern businesses.

counters.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, location, or service type...
counters.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. General inquiries and document processing
counters.deactivateDesc: This counter will stop serving tickets

counters.noQueuesAvailable: No queues available for this branch
counters.noBranches: No branches found. Create a branch first.
counters.assignEmployeeDesc: Select an employee to assign to this counter. Each employee can only be assigned to one counter.

counters.noEmployeesAvailable: No eligible employees available. Employees must be active and have a phone number.
counters.autoCredentialsDesc: Login credentials will be generated automatically when the counter is created.
counters.credentialsWarning: Please save these credentials now. The passcode cannot be retrieved later, only reset.
counters.passcodeManagementDesc: Generate a new random passcode for this counter. The current passcode will be invalidated.
counters.changeEmployeeDesc: Select a different employee to reassign this counter. Changing the employee will generate new credentials.
counters.selectServicesDesc: Choose which services this counter handles
counters.selectLanguagesDesc: Choose languages spoken at this counter

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Manage your customer base and contact information
customers.noCustomersDesc: Customers will appear here when they register through your Telegram bot, book appointments, or are added manually.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Let's set up your workspace. How does your business operate?
onboarding.soloDesc: I run my business alone — direct appointment booking for clients.
onboarding.multiDesc: I have a team — manage counters, queues, and employees.
onboarding.setupSubtitle: Tell us about your business so we can configure everything perfectly.
onboarding.readyDescSolo: Your solo workspace is ready. Start managing appointments right away.
onboarding.readyDescMulti: Your team workspace is ready. Set up branches, counters, and start.
onboarding.readySoloHint: Appointment booking, Telegram bot, smart scheduling
onboarding.readyMultiHint: Branches, counters, queues, and team management
onboarding.canSwitchLater: You can switch to multi-staff mode anytime in Settings.

appointments.noServices: No services yet. Add your first one!
appointments.noSlotsAvailable: No slots available for this day
appointments.earningsDesc: How much did you earn for this appointment? This helps you track your daily revenue.
appointments.earningsHint: Tracking earnings helps analyze your finances — this is optional

analytics.subtitle: Comprehensive insights into your queue operations
analytics.peakHoursDesc: Identify your busiest hours across the selected period
analytics.ticketDynamicsDesc: Compare ticket generation against completion rates over time
analytics.customerEngagementDesc: Track customer interaction quality and engagement metrics
analytics.conversionRate: Track ticket lifecycle from generation to completion
analytics.customerDynamicsDesc: Periodical customer volume trends with service time correlation
analytics.serviceTimeDistributionDesc: Average service duration across the period
analytics.queuePerformanceDesc: Per-queue breakdown of ticket lifecycle events
analytics.employeeLeaderboardDesc: Top performers ranked by tickets served

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteBotConfirm: This will permanently delete the bot and all linked Telegram users. This action cannot be undone.
settings.updateBotTokenDesc: Replace the current token with a new one to reconnect.
settings.botSetupDesc: Connect a Telegram bot to enable customer notifications and queue management.
settings.setupStep3: Copy the token and paste it below
settings.businessModeDesc: Switch between solo and multi-staff modes
settings.currentModeSoloDesc: You manage everything yourself with direct appointment booking
settings.currentModeMultiDesc: Team-based workflow with counters, queues, and employees
settings.soloSwitchDesc: Run your business solo — direct appointment booking for clients with flexible time slots.
settings.multiSwitchDesc: Manage a team — counters, queues, employees, and multi-branch operations.
settings.confirmSwitchToMultiDesc: Your workspace will be reconfigured for team management. You can switch back to solo mode anytime.
settings.switchSuccess: Mode switched successfully! Your workspace has been reconfigured.
settings.setupSoloProfileDesc: Configure your business type and services before switching to solo mode.
settings.operatingHoursDesc: Set default working hours for your multi-staff system
settings.avgServiceTimeDesc: How long it typically takes staff to serve one client
settings.soloScheduleDesc: Set your available working days and time slots for client bookings

employees.roleBranchManagerDesc: Can manage a branch, its counters, queues, and staff

employees.tryDifferentSearch: Try a different search term or filter
